Website Builder for ChatGPT
Your conversation becomes your website

Jimdo builds your professional business website directly from what you've already discussed with ChatGPT — no templates, no design work, no starting from scratch. Your conversation becomes your content.

---
What You Can Do

Turn any conversation into a website — Jimdo uses the context of your conversation to generate relevant content and professional design tailored to your specific business.

Review your details in an interactive form — A clean, two-step form lets you confirm or adjust:
  - Business name and category
  - A compelling description based on your conversation
  - Location and services

Get a complete website in minutes — Your website is created with:
  - Professional imagery matched to your industry
  - A color scheme that fits your brand
  - Content pulled directly from your conversation

 Publish or grow with Jimdo — Take your new website to Jimdo's AI-powered growth platform:
  - Domain registration
  - Booking systems
  - Local search optimization
  - Strategic guidance to grow your business online

  ---
  Try These Prompts

  - "Jimdo, create a photography website for my business"
  - "Jimdo, build me a website based on what we discussed"
  - "Jimdo, turn this into a professional site"

  ---
  Features

  - Conversation-powered content — No writing needed, we use what you've already shared
  - 80+ industry themes — From restaurants and salons to consulting firms and photographers
  - 8 languages supported — English, German, Spanish, French, Italian, Japanese, Dutch, and Portuguese
  - Dark mode — Automatically matches your ChatGPT theme
  - Secure authentication — OAuth 2.1 keeps your account protected

  ---
 How It Works

  1. Have a conversation with ChatGPT about your business
  2. Ask Jimdo to create your website
  3. Review the pre-filled business details
  4. Click "Create Website" and start customizing in the Jimdo editor

ApartmentList for ChatGPT 
Release Date: January 29, 2026
We're excited to announce the first release of the ApartmentList app for ChatGPT! Search for rental apartments directly within ChatGPT and explore listings on an interactive map.
✨ Features
Interactive Apartment Search
Search for apartments in any US city, neighborhood, or zip code
Filter by bedrooms, bathrooms, price range, and amenities
View results on a beautiful interactive map with price pill markers
Smart Filtering
Bedrooms & Bathrooms - Find the perfect size for your needs
Budget - Set minimum and maximum rent limits
Amenities - Filter for pet-friendly, parking, in-unit laundry, gym, pool, and more
Rich Property Details
View high-quality photos of each property
See pricing and availability for different unit types
Explore amenities, pet policies, and lease terms
Get neighborhood information and property descriptions
Seamless Experience
Inline map preview expands to fullscreen for detailed exploration
Horizontal carousel for quick browsing on mobile and desktop
Click any map marker to see property details instantly

🚀 Getting Started
Simply ask ChatGPT something like:
"Find me apartments in San Diego"
"Show me 2-bedroom apartments in Austin under $2,500"
"I need a pet-friendly apartment with parking in Seattle"
📝 Feedback
We'd love to hear your feedback! Let us know how we can improve your apartment search experience.
Happy apartment hunting! excited to launch Retell AI’s integration with ChatGPT, making it easy for anyone to create human-sounding AI voice agents through simple chat conversation.

With this launch, you can build voice agents that talk naturally on the phone and handle real calls—without complex setup or technical knowledge.

Key Features:

Agent Creation: Conversationally configure and create voice agents with custom names, voices, languages, and functions like call transfers and endings. ChatGPT auto-generates prompts based on your descriptions.

Testing Interface: Validate agents via interactive chat or test phone calls to ensure accurate responses and voice behavior.

Editing Capabilities: Update your agent and fine-tune its behavior with easy, side-by-side changes.

Agent Management: View a list of all agents in your workspace, including details like IDs, voices, and languages.

Deployment: Assign agents to phone numbers for inbound/outbound calls, making them live for customer interactions.

This integration supports diverse use cases like customer support, sales outreach, and more, all handled conversationally within ChatGPT. For feedback or support, reach out at support@retellai.com. presentations instantly with Beautiful.ai + ChatGPT

This release introduces the Beautiful.ai ChatGPT app, powered by a secure Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that connects ChatGPT directly to Beautiful.ai’s presentation engine.

Highlights

From idea to slides in seconds
Describe your goal, outline, or rough notes—ChatGPT uses our MCP server to generate a complete, structured Beautiful.ai presentation automatically.

Smart slide design, built in
Presentations are created using Beautiful.ai’s design system, ensuring clear layouts, visual balance, and professional formatting without manual slide editing.

Works in multiple languages
The app supports users across all supported locales, including English, German, Dutch, Swedish, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, Russian, Ukrainian, Polish, Chinese, Japanese, and Korean—making it easy to create presentations for global teams.

Secure, permission-based access
MCP enables ChatGPT to safely request presentation creation actions without exposing user data or requiring manual excited to introduce the TourRadar AI Assistant, a new way to search, explore, and book multi-day tours, river cruises, safaris and adventures through a conversational AI experience. Simply describe what kind of trip you're looking for, and let the assistant do the rest.


WHAT YOU CAN DO
---------------

Search for Tours

  - Describe your dream trip in your own words, for example  "a 10-day hiking adventure in nepal" or "a europe tour through paris, rome and munich" and get relevant tour suggestions instantly.
  - Filter results by destination, travel dates, trip duration, group size, price range, and more.
  - Browse results visually with tour cards showing images, prices, ratings, and key details at a glance.

Explore Tour Details

  - View full itineraries: see what happens each day of the tour, complete with descriptions and photos.
  - Check ratings and reviews: see overall scores and breakdowns for accommodation, transport, food, guides, and itinerary.
  - See the route on a map: an interactive map shows you exactly where the tour goes, day by day.
  - Compare multiple tours side by side on the map to help you decide which route is best for you.

Check Availability and Prices

  - Browse departure dates by selecting a month to see what's available.
  - See departure status: know whether a departure is guaranteed, on request, or already sold out.
  - View pricing for each departure including any promotions or discounts.

Book and Get More Information

  - Request a booking directly through the assistant. Provide your details and receive a confirmation link to complete your reservation.
  - Send a brochure to your email. Get a PDF with all the tour details for offline reading or sharing with travel companions.
  - Read FAQs. get answers to common questions about inclusions, requirements, and policies for any tour.

Look Up Reference Information

  - Ask about available countries, cities, continents, currencies, languages, and tour types to help narrow down your search.
  - Search for a specific tour operator by name to find tours run by your favourite company.


HOW IT WORKS
------------

The TourRadar AI Assistant works inside ChatGPT. Just start a conversation, describe what you're looking for, and the assistant will search TourRadar's catalogue of thousands of tours from thousands of operators worldwide.

You'll see interactive cards, maps, and tables; all designed to help you find and book the perfect trip without leaving the chat.


TIPS FOR GETTING THE BEST RESULTS
----------------------------------

  - Be specific, for example,  "7-day cultural tour in Japan in October for 2 people under $3000" will give better results than just "Japan tours."
  - Use follow-up questions, after seeing results, ask things like "show me the itinerary" or "what departures are available in June?"
  - Try the map view,  it's a great way to understand the route before you commit.
  - Send yourself a brochure, handy for sharing with friends or reviewing later.


We hope you enjoy exploring the world with the TourRadar AI Assistant. Happy travels!

Welcome to the very first release of AI Tarot! We’ve blended classic Rider-Waite symbolism with AI language intelligence to bring quick, private divination right into ChatGPT.

What’s inside

Three-Card Spread Engine – Shuffle digital tarot cards and draw a past–present–future spread in one tap.
Conversational Guidance – Ask follow-ups like “interpret the reversed card” or “explain this symbolism” and receive tailored insights.
Secure Session History – Your readings stay on your device—encrypted, ad-free, and judgment-free.

Whether you need a quick “pull a card for me” moment or a deeper life check-in, AI Tarot is ready to guide you. Version 1.0 introduces the ZoomInfo MCP Server, enabling structured access to ZoomInfo’s core data and intelligence tools through MCP.

Included Tools

lookup
Retrieve standardized reference values (industries, metro regions, management levels, employee ranges, tech vendors, etc.).

search_contacts
Search ZoomInfo’s contact database using structured filters.

search_companies

🆕 Nouveauté : Leboncoin débarque dans ChatGPT (et ça change tout)

Bonne nouvelle : vous pouvez maintenant **chercher sur Leboncoin directement depuis ChatGPT**, sans jongler entre dix onglets. Que vous soyez en mission "appart", "voiture", ou "cadeau de dernière minute", on s'occupe du repérage.

### 🔎 Ce que vous pouvez rechercher dès maintenant

* 🏠 **Immobilier** : **ventes** et **locations** (appartements, maisons…)
* 🚗 **Voitures** : avec filtres utiles (prix, département, Crit'Air…)
* 🛋️ **Maison / déco** : canapés, meubles, électroménager…
* 🧸 **Jeux & jouets** : LEGO, jeux de société, tout le bonheur des cadeaux malins
* 📱 **High-tech** : iPhone et compagnie, consoles, accessoires…
* …et **plein d'autres catégories** déjà présentes sur Leboncoin

### ⚡ Pourquoi c'est cool

* **Plus rapide** : vous dites "je veux une maison en Bretagne < 150k€" → hop, on sort des annonces.
* **Plus malin** : on peut **affiner au fil de la conversation** ("ok mais plutôt meublé", "crit'air 1", "envoi possible", "pro/particulier"…).
* **Plus simple** : une demande = une shortlist release introduces a comprehensive travel safety assessment tool that aggregates data from four authoritative sources: US State Department advisories, UK Foreign Office warnings, ACLED conflict monitoring, and GDELT global news analysis. Users can search any city or country to instantly view a composite safety score, recent incident data, news sentiment trends, and official government recommendations. The widget supports hydration from natural language prompts, so asking "Is it safe to travel to Mexico?" opens directly to the Mexico results page with all relevant data pre-loaded.

The interface features a clean, mobile-friendly design with a compact header, clickable city navigation, and an expandable detailed analysis section. Country views now include a "Cities in [Country]" section for quick access to major destinations, while city views display nearby cities for regional comparison. All data sources stack vertically in the expanded view for improved readability, and a Home button provides easy navigation back to the main search screen.
